nodes.label: AI as collaborative content creation partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous content generator
nodes.grounding_span: I then worked collaboratively with the AI to refine the blog post until it was to my liking

nodes.label: AI specificity and depth of output
nodes.grounding_span: I usually asked the AI to be more specific, as it was giving general facts about the languages

nodes.label: AI source reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I do sometimes have to double check sources as there have been some hallucinations

nodes.label: AI use in core transcription service
nodes.grounding_span: I am not against using AI for transcription, but I would definitely edit and proofread the transcripts myself

nodes.label: AI for client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I would use it for client communication, as it just seems faster to do it myself

nodes.label: AI guidance and suggestion for new use cases
nodes.grounding_span: I do wish it presented other ways it could help me that I haven't thought of

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It used to take me several hours to craft one post, and now I feel like I can write one that's even longer but shorter time-wise

nodes.label: Accuracy and truthfulness
nodes.grounding_span: I do feel a responsibility to post true things to the best of my ability and to cite my sources

nodes.label: Personal expertise and continuous learning
nodes.grounding_span: I am constantly reading and learning about languages, so I try to keep growing personally

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for blog posts
nodes.grounding_span: I really, really like AI for blog posts

nodes.label: Caution due to AI hallucinations
nodes.grounding_span: I do sometimes have to double check sources as there have been some hallucinations

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use with guidance
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't mind expanding it, but I'm not sure in what ways. I think I would need guidance

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think I would use it for client communication

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through narrowing parameters
nodes.grounding_span: I asked the AI for 3 languages, and then kept asking (narrowing down my parameters and saying no to certain languages) until I got 3 I wanted

nodes.label: Systematic verification using external sources
nodes.grounding_span: I typically start with Wikipedia and the sources listed in Wikipedia. I use a lot of journals and scientific research as sources
